intro: Aloe vera tincture is a concentrated liquid extract made from the gel of the aloe vera plant, often used in herbal remedies to promote skin and hair health. This tincture is typically created through a process of maceration, where the aloe vera gel is steeped in a solvent such as glycerin or ethanol to release its active compounds. Aloe vera tincture is commonly used to soothe skin irritations, calm inflammation, and support the body's natural healing processes.
